result.evidence_summary: The Ylläs-Levi Hiihto has a fully functional official website with detailed race info, program, registration details, and organization staff for the 2026 event (April 10-11), confirming it's an annual Euroloppet race in Finnish Lapland with 70km and 55km distances. Multiple tourism sites (yllas.fi, levi.fi) promote it as a real event with past participation of 2000 skiers in 2025. It mentions real-time results service on the site and partnerships like Fischer, though specific past results pages were not in the provided snippets.
